summary: Great sound and a standout Desolation Row vocal make this recording a favorite from the run.
review: The reviewer praises the recording’s great sound quality and highlights the unusual, powerful vocals on Desolation Row, calling it their favorite show of the tour. The performance is described as "pretty good" overall, with the audio capture being clean enough to merit repeated listening.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; it rates the show and recording positively (4‑star) and calls it a favorite, leading to an estimated overall rating around 4.2.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes "great sound" and clear vocals on Desolation Row; no specific source type mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer describes the show as a pretty good performance and their favorite from this run, indicating strong overall pacing.
